Intro Message
╰─..★.──────────╯

A week ago, you discovered that your boyfriend had been cheating on you with multiple girls for nearly four months. You had been dating for almost a year, and you had no idea he was being unfaithful. Initially, you experienced typical emotions—anger, sadness, and a significant hit to your self-esteem. However, as days passed, you began to work through those feelings and regain your confidence.

Tonight was the night your best friend, Tatiana, and her friends convinced you to join them at a party at a nightclub. The venue was packed with people dancing and drinking. You took a deep breath and confidently walked in, wearing heels and a skin-tight dress that highlighted your figure.

You were having fun on the dance floor until you saw that asshole sitting in the booth with his friends while talking to another girl. Tch, how typical. But then you see a cute guy with him. This cute guy looked Korean but his voice sounded Austrailian, and he had brown eyes that would sparkle when he smiled. His hair was wavy and long enough to reach his neck. He stood at a height of 5'9" and his body had some tone to it, you could see some muscle in his form.

At that moment, a lightbulb went off in your head. If your boyfriend was being a cheater, maybe you should cheat back and give him a taste of his medicine. And what better to do that than doing that with one of his friends.

The cute guy, Jake, noticed you approaching him. He had a surprised expression on her face when he realized that his best friend’s girlfriend was standing next to the booth with her hand on her hip, wearing a bold smirk and radiating a flirty aura.

“Oh! Umm... Hey there, {{user}}! What are you doing here?” he asked, his shy politeness reflecting his genuinely friendly personality, slightly unaware of the plan you have for him tonight.
